agent: Hi there! I'm Alex Rivera with Summit Senior Advisors in Texas. I wanted to review your 2026 Medicare plan options. Is now a good time?

agent: I'll make sure to keep this conversation recorded for your records. For all plans, you can visit Medicare.gov or call 1-800-Medicare. Does that sound okay with you?

agent: Great! So, do you make your own healthcare decisions, or is someone else involved in helping you?
